spec.expr: max by(instance, device, model_name) (smartctl_device_power_on_seconds{instance=~"$node", device=~"$disk"}) * on(instance, device) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type", serial_number=~"$serial_number", model_name=~"$device_model"}

max(smartctl_device_power_cycle_count{instance=~"$node", device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(interface,serial_number,model_family,model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}) by (instance, device, model_name)

title: 総合
